stage.subtitle_ar: هنا تتحدث الإنجليزية عن أقرب شيء إلى عملك: السيارة وأجزاؤها وأنواعها، وكيف تصفها لعميلك بثقة.

content.intro_ar: أنت تعرف السيارة من الداخل والخارج أفضل من كثيرين، والجديد اليوم هو أسماؤها بالإنجليزية. في هذا الدرس ستتعلم كلمات مثل engine وbrake وtire — كلمات ستستخدمها كل يوم في الورشة ومع العملاء والمورّدين. ابدأ بالمفردات، ثم اقرأ النص وستجد الكلمات نفسها أمامك في موقف حقيقي.

vocab.meaning_en: the part that makes the car move
vocab.example: I check the engine every morning.

vocab.meaning_en: the round part that turns under the car
vocab.example: The car has four wheels.

vocab.meaning_en: the rubber part around the wheel
vocab.example: This tire is new.

vocab.meaning_en: the part that stops the car
vocab.example: The brakes stop the car.

vocab.meaning_en: the part that gives electric power
vocab.example: The battery is weak.

vocab.meaning_en: liquid that keeps the engine smooth
vocab.example: The engine needs new oil.

vocab.meaning_en: the cover over the engine
vocab.example: Open the hood, please.

vocab.meaning_en: the space at the back for bags
vocab.example: Put the bags in the trunk.

vocab.meaning_en: you open it to get in the car
vocab.example: Please close the door.

vocab.meaning_en: the place where you sit in the car
vocab.example: The seats are clean.

vocab.meaning_en: glass that helps you see behind you
vocab.example: Look in the mirror before you drive.

vocab.meaning_en: it helps you see at night
vocab.example: Turn on the lights at night.

paragraphs: I work in my workshop every day. My workshop is in the industrial area of the city. A customer comes with his car. First, I open the hood and look at the engine. The engine is the heart of the car. I check the oil too. Good oil keeps the engine strong.

Then I check the battery. Here the summer is very hot, and a weak battery is a big problem. I look at the four tires. One tire is old, so I change it. Now every wheel is safe. The new tire costs 300 riyals.

Inside the car, I test the brakes. The brakes must work well. I clean the seats and the mirrors. I also check the lights. At the end, I close the doors and the trunk. The car is ready, and the customer is happy.

key_phrases.en: This tire is old. You need a new one.
key_phrases.ar: هذا الإطار قديم، تحتاج إلى إطار جديد.

comprehension.question: What is "the heart of the car" in the reading?
comprehension.explanation_ar: النص يقول: المحرّك هو قلب السيارة (The engine is the heart of the car).

comprehension.question: Why is a weak battery a big problem?
options: Because the summer is very hot
comprehension.correct: Because the summer is very hot
comprehension.explanation_ar: النص يذكر أن الصيف هنا حار جدًا، لذلك البطارية الضعيفة مشكلة كبيرة.

comprehension.question: How much does the new tire cost?
comprehension.explanation_ar: النص يقول إن الإطار الجديد يكلّف ٣٠٠ ريال (The new tire costs 300 riyals).

comprehension.question: What does the worker test inside the car?
comprehension.explanation_ar: داخل السيارة، يختبر العامل المكابح: I test the brakes.

comprehension.question: What happens at the end of the day?
options: The customer buys a new car
comprehension.explanation_ar: في نهاية النص: السيارة جاهزة والعميل سعيد (The car is ready, and the customer is happy).

task.prompt_en: Write 3–4 sentences about a car in your workshop. Name three parts and say if each one is good or old.
task.prompt_ar: اكتب ٣–٤ جُمل عن سيارة في ورشتك. اذكر ثلاثة أجزاء منها، وقل إن كان كل جزء جيدًا أم قديمًا.
task.guidance_ar: استخدم ٤ كلمات على الأقل من كلمات الدرس، مثل engine وbrake وtire وbattery.

content.intro_ar: في المعرض، كل عميل يبحث عن نوع مختلف من السيارات: عائلة تريد سيدان، وشركة تحتاج ڤان، وشاب يسأل عن سيارة كهربائية. في هذا الدرس ستتعلم أسماء أنواع السيارات بالإنجليزية لتتحدث عن كل نوع تبيعه بثقة، وتفهم طلب العميل من أول جملة.

vocab.meaning_en: a normal car with four doors and a trunk
vocab.example: A sedan is a good family car.

vocab.meaning_en: a big, tall car for families and long trips
vocab.example: This SUV is perfect for desert trips.

vocab.meaning_en: a car with an open back for carrying things
vocab.example: The farmer bought a strong pickup.

vocab.meaning_en: a big car for carrying people or goods
vocab.example: The company uses a van for its goods.

vocab.meaning_en: a car that uses fuel and electricity
vocab.example: A hybrid saves money on fuel.

vocab.meaning_en: working with electricity, not fuel
vocab.example: Electric cars are very quiet.

vocab.meaning_en: petrol or gas that a car needs to move
vocab.example: Fuel prices went up this month.

vocab.meaning_en: one type of car from a company
vocab.example: This model is new this year.

vocab.meaning_en: the name of the company that makes the car
vocab.example: Which brand do you like most?

vocab.meaning_en: very comfortable and expensive
vocab.example: Luxury cars are beautiful but expensive.

vocab.meaning_en: cheap to buy and cheap to use
vocab.example: An economy car is good for daily work.

vocab.meaning_en: not new; it had an owner before
vocab.example: He bought a used car at a good price.

paragraphs: In my showroom, I sell many types of cars. Families usually want a sedan or an SUV. A sedan is comfortable and easy to park, and its fuel cost is low. An SUV is bigger and stronger, so it is perfect for long trips and desert roads.

Businesses need different cars. A small company often buys a van to carry goods, and many workers choose a pickup because it is strong and simple. Last month, I sold five pickups to a farm near the city.
Today, more customers ask about hybrid and electric cars. A hybrid uses both fuel and electricity, so it saves money. An electric car needs no fuel at all, but it needs a charger at home.

Every customer asks the same questions: Which brand is best? Which model is new? Is a used car a good idea? My answer is simple: the best car is the car that fits your life and your budget. A luxury car is beautiful, but an economy car is a smart choice for daily work.

key_phrases.en: What type of car are you looking for?
key_phrases.ar: ما نوع السيارة التي تبحث عنها؟

key_phrases.en: This model is very popular this year.
key_phrases.ar: هذا الطراز مطلوب جدًا هذه السنة.

key_phrases.en: A hybrid saves fuel and money.
This used car is in excellent condition.

comprehension.question: Why do families like a sedan?
options: It is comfortable and easy to park
It is good for carrying goods
It is the most expensive car
comprehension.correct: It is comfortable and easy to park
comprehension.explanation_ar: النص يقول إن السيدان مريحة وسهلة الركن، وتكلفة وقودها منخفضة.

comprehension.question: Who bought five pickups last month?
comprehension.explanation_ar: باع الكاتب خمس سيارات بيك أب لمزرعة قرب المدينة (a farm near the city).

comprehension.question: What does a hybrid car use?
comprehension.explanation_ar: السيارة الهجينة تستخدم الوقود والكهرباء معًا، ولهذا توفّر المال.

comprehension.question: What does an electric car need at home?
comprehension.explanation_ar: السيارة الكهربائية لا تحتاج وقودًا، لكنها تحتاج شاحنًا في المنزل (a charger at home).

comprehension.question: What is the seller's advice about the best car?
options: Choose the car that fits your life and budget
comprehension.correct: Choose the car that fits your life and budget
comprehension.explanation_ar: نصيحة البائع: أفضل سيارة هي التي تناسب حياتك وميزانيتك.

task.prompt_en: Talk for one minute about the types of cars you sell or like. Which type do your customers want most, and why?
task.prompt_ar: تحدّث لمدة دقيقة عن أنواع السيارات التي تبيعها أو تفضّلها. ما النوع الأكثر طلبًا عند عملائك؟ ولماذا؟
task.guidance_ar: استخدم ٤ كلمات على الأقل من كلمات الدرس، مثل sedan وSUV وhybrid وfuel.

content.intro_ar: بيع السيارة يبدأ بوصفٍ صادق يكسب ثقة العميل — وأنت تفعل هذا كل يوم بالعربية. في هذا الدرس ستتعلم كيف تصف حالة السيارة بالإنجليزية: الممشى، والطلاء، وناقل الحركة، والضمان. عبارات قصيرة ستستخدمها في المعرض مع كل عميل جديد.

vocab.meaning_en: how good or bad something is
vocab.example: The car is in excellent condition.

vocab.meaning_en: how many kilometers a car has driven
vocab.example: Low mileage means a better price.

vocab.meaning_en: the car changes gears by itself
vocab.example: Most customers want an automatic car.

vocab.meaning_en: the driver changes gears by hand
vocab.example: He likes to drive a manual car.

vocab.meaning_en: with a lot of space inside
vocab.example: The SUV is spacious inside.

vocab.meaning_en: with a strong engine
vocab.example: This engine is very powerful.

vocab.meaning_en: it works well and does not break
vocab.example: A reliable car saves you money.

vocab.meaning_en: nice and easy to sit in
vocab.example: The seats are very comfortable.

vocab.meaning_en: a small thin mark on the paint
vocab.example: There is a small scratch on the door.

vocab.meaning_en: a low place in the car body after a hit
vocab.example: The dent is easy to repair.

vocab.meaning_en: the color layer on the car body
vocab.example: The paint still looks new.

vocab.meaning_en: a promise to repair the car for free
vocab.example: The car comes with a one-year warranty.

reading.title_en: A Good Car for a Good Price
paragraphs: A customer came to my showroom yesterday. He wanted a family car in good condition, but not a new one. I showed him a used sedan, model 2022. "This car is reliable," I told him. "The mileage is low — only 45,000 kilometers."

The customer looked at the car slowly. The paint was clean, and there was only one small scratch on the back door. There was no dent in the body. Inside, the car was spacious and comfortable, with seats for the whole family.

"Is it automatic or manual?" he asked. "Automatic," I said. "The engine is powerful but quiet, and the fuel cost is low." Then I gave him the most important news: "The car comes with a one-year warranty from my workshop."
He drove the car for ten minutes. Then he smiled and said, "The condition is excellent. How much?" We agreed on 52,000 riyals. A fair price for him, and a good sale for me.

key_phrases.en: The car is in excellent condition.
It has a small scratch, but no dents.
key_phrases.ar: فيها خدش صغير، لكن لا توجد انبعاجات.

key_phrases.en: It is spacious and comfortable for the family.
The engine is powerful but quiet.
It comes with a one-year warranty.

comprehension.question: What kind of car did the customer want?
options: A family car in good condition
comprehension.correct: A family car in good condition
comprehension.explanation_ar: أراد العميل سيارة عائلية بحالة جيدة، وليست جديدة.

comprehension.question: What was on the back door?
comprehension.explanation_ar: كان هناك خدش صغير واحد فقط على الباب الخلفي، ولا يوجد أي انبعاج في الهيكل.

comprehension.question: What did the seller offer with the car?
comprehension.explanation_ar: قدّم البائع ضمانًا لمدة سنة من ورشته مع السيارة.

comprehension.question: How much did they agree on?
comprehension.explanation_ar: اتفقا في النهاية على ٥٢,٠٠٠ ريال — سعر عادل للطرفين.

task.prompt_en: Describe one car from your business in 4–5 sentences. Write about its condition, its mileage, and why it is a good car.
task.prompt_ar: صِف سيارة واحدة من عملك في ٤–٥ جُمل. اكتب عن حالتها وممشاها، ولماذا هي سيارة جيدة.
task.guidance_ar: استخدم ٤ كلمات على الأقل من كلمات الدرس، مثل condition وmileage وreliable وwarranty.
